title: More Aspect Enchantments
description: Adds a large amount of new Elemental-based aspect enchantments to the game.
body:
Adds 11 new aspect enchantments and reworks Fire Aspect to be more usable. These enchantments are based on the elements, sort of like a minecraft-interpretation of Avatar the Last Airbender but combined with the DnD inner planes. The maximum enchant level is 2, but they will scale further if you use another mod to remove scaling limits. Each of these enchantmnets are incompatable with each other, so you will have to choose which one you want to use.

### Elemental Aspects
<details>
<summary>🔥Fire Aspect</summary>
Ignites the target on fire for a duration. The target receives bad luck, and at Level II, Fire spawns around the target on each hit.
</details>


<details>
<summary>💨Air Aspect</summary>
Makes the target wind charged, and gives the target levitation for a certain amount of time. Grants the user slow falling for a time.
</details>


<details>
<summary>🪨 Earth Aspect</summary>
Replaces the two blocks where the target stands with dirt for a short time and gives the target weakness. Grants the User Absorption for a short time.
</details>


<details>
<summary>🌊 Water Aspect</summary>
Deals drowning damage to the target and Places a water source under the target for a short time. Grants the user water breathing for a short time. 
</details>

### Quasi-Elemental Aspects
<details>
<summary>☀️ Radiant Aspect</summary>
On hit adds the glow effect to the target for a short time. Grants the user night vision for a short time.
</details>


<details>
<summary>🦇 Darkness Aspect</summary>
On hit applies the darkness and weaving effects to the target for a short time.
</details>


<details>
<summary>💎 Mineral Aspect</summary>
On hit, grants luck to the user. Additionally, on hit has a chance of gaining a mineral from the loot table. At level II, grants a chance from a second loot table with more rare minerals. If you're extremely lucky (1 in 10,000), you might even get a netherite ingot. 
</details>


<details>
<summary>⚡Lightning Aspect</summary>
On Hit, has a chance to strike the target with a lightning bolt. At Level II, has an additional second chance. Applies fire resistance to the target so they do not take burn damage from the lightning.
</details>

### Para-Elemental Aspects

<details>
<summary>🧊 Freeze Aspect</summary>
On Hit, adds the slow effect and spawns powdered snow under the target for a short time.
</details>


<details>
<summary>🟢 Ooze Aspect</summary>
Gives the target the oozing and nausea effects on hit.
</details>


<details>
<summary>🌋Lava Aspect</summary>
On hit, for a very short time places a lava block under the target. Grants fire resistance to the user for a time.
</details>


<details>
<summary>💥Explosion Aspect</summary>
On hit, grants speed to the user, and has a chance of causing an explosion around the target.
</details>
